name: United Bullion Exchange, Inc.
summary: United Bullion Exchange, Inc. acquires, explores, develops, mines, and produces minerals in the United States. It primarily explores lithium brines. The company was formerly known as Causeway Entertainment Co. and changed its name to United Bullion Exchange, Inc. in May 2011. United Bullion Exchange, Inc. was founded in 2002 and is based in Henderson, Nevada.
